testCases.title: Admin — Orders Module Accessible
testCases.notes: Orders navigation item visible in admin left sidebar at /#!/workspace. Orders module accessible from main admin navigation. Admin can view and manage all store orders.

testCases.title: Admin — Orders List View
testCases.notes: Admin dashboard shows Revenue $1,080,009,218,461.87 USD and 604 customers with orders. Orders list accessible from Orders module. Sortable, filterable order list with columns: order number, customer, date, status, total.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Status Management
testCases.notes: Per project memory (project_order_status_vocab.md): Admin OrderStatusType enum values differ from storefront labels. Admin uses enum values for seeding; UI assertions use storefront labels. Orders module supports status transitions.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Detail View
testCases.notes: Order detail accessible from orders list. Order detail shows: line items, customer info, billing/shipping addresses, payment details, shipment details, order history/changelog.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Line Items
testCases.notes: Order line items display: product name, SKU, quantity, unit price, total. Admin can view all line items per order. Product details linkable from order view.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Customer Information
testCases.notes: Order customer: contact name, email, organization (for B2B). Carlos Rodriguez / BuildRight org visible in B2B orders. Customer contact linked from order detail.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Billing Address
testCases.notes: Billing address stored per order. Address includes: name, company, address1, city, state, country, zip. Address verified during checkout (VCST-4710 address facets). Admin shows stored billing address.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Shipping Address
testCases.notes: Shipping address per order (for delivery orders). BOPIS pickup orders show pickup location: Delancey St & Essex St, Michigan, 10094, United States. Delivery orders show ship-to address.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Total Calculation
testCases.notes: Order total = Subtotal + Tax + Shipping - Discounts. Standard B2B order: Subtotal $100.00, Discount -$0.01, Tax +$20.00, Shipping $0.00, Total $119.99. Admin shows calculated totals matching storefront.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Search and Filter
testCases.notes: Orders list filterable by: date range, status, customer, order number. Search by order number or customer name. Filters help locate specific orders in large order list.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Export
testCases.notes: Order data exportable from admin (CSV/Excel format). Admin Orders module supports export functionality. Used for reporting and reconciliation.

testCases.title: Admin — B2B Order Management
testCases.notes: B2B org orders (BuildRight) visible in admin. Organization context shown in order detail. B2B orders may have: quote-to-order conversion, org-level payment terms, net payment terms.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Comments / Notes
testCases.notes: Admin can add internal comments/notes to orders. Order notes visible in order detail changelog. Customer-facing vs internal notes distinction.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Changelog / History
testCases.notes: Order history/changelog shows state transitions, admin actions, timestamps. Auditable order lifecycle from creation through fulfillment.

testCases.title: Admin — Quotes Module
testCases.notes: Quotes navigation accessible from admin. B2B Quote Request flow: storefront QUOTE REQUEST section → admin Quotes module. Quotes manageable from admin (approve, reject, negotiate).

testCases.title: Admin — Order Dashboard Metrics
testCases.notes: Admin dashboard: Revenue $1,080,009,218,461.87 USD. 604 customers with orders. Dashboard provides aggregate order metrics. Revenue calculation per currency.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Status Transitions
testCases.notes: Admin can transition order status (e.g., New → Processing → Complete → Cancelled). Status workflow enforced. B2B order approval workflow if enabled. Per order_status_vocab.md: enum vs storefront label mapping.

testCases.title: Admin — Return/Refund Module
testCases.notes: Returns module accessible from admin (under 'More' or dedicated module). Return requests visible to admin. Returns can be linked to original orders. Refund processing via payment module.

testCases.title: Admin — Loyalty Points on Orders
testCases.notes: Per cart verification: 'Pay with points' payment option available. Loyalty points module integrated with order processing. Points balance and redemption tracked per order.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Shipment Management
testCases.notes: Shipment details per order: carrier, tracking number, shipment status. BOPIS shipments: pickup location and confirmation. Admin can update shipment status and tracking.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Tax Details
testCases.notes: Tax breakdown visible in order detail: $20.00 tax on $100.00 subtotal (20% rate). Tax calculated post-discount. Tax details stored per order for compliance.

testCases.title: Admin — Discount/Coupon on Order
testCases.notes: Discount -$0.01 (automatic promotion) stored on order. Coupon-applied discounts also stored. Admin can see applied promotions and their discount amounts per order.

testCases.title: Admin — Place Order via Admin
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Creating order from admin (without storefront checkout flow) deferred. Admin order creation requires customer and product selection — not executed in this run.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Cancellation
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Cancelling an existing order deferred. Cancellation would affect order data integrity for downstream test assertions.

testCases.title: Admin — Bulk Order Operations
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Bulk status updates or bulk export for multiple orders deferred. Bulk operations require selecting multiple orders.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Invoice/Document Generation
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Invoice or packing slip generation per order deferred. Document generation feature not tested in this run.

testCases.title: Admin — Manual Payment Recording
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Recording manual payment (bank transfer, check) against an order requires selecting a specific order and accessing payment tab. Manual payment method visible in storefront (5th option) but admin recording flow not executed.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Fulfillment Center Routing
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Verifying order routing to correct fulfillment center based on BOPIS vs delivery requires accessing specific order and fulfillment routing configuration. Deferred to Suite 056 (Inventory).

testCases.title: Admin — Net Payment Terms (B2B)
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: B2B net payment terms (Net 30, Net 60) configuration and per-order application requires accessing Customer module settings for BuildRight org. Not verified in this admin run.

testCases.title: Admin — Order Analytics / Reports
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Detailed order analytics (revenue by product, category, customer segment) beyond dashboard summary deferred. Analytics module access not executed in this run.
